_comment: Verification config combines semantic Scenario and runtime topology. Required scenario keys: case_id, name, timeline. Runtime sections: toolchain, recording, vehicles, reports_dir.

_options.toolchain.env.RFV_VEHICLE_NUM: Number of DT vehicles launched by the selected toolchain script.
_options.toolchain.env.RFV_START_INDEX: First DT vehicle index launched by the selected toolchain script.
_options.toolchain.env.RFV_DLL_MODEL: CopterSim DLL/SO model name, written to DLLModel in SITLRun.bat/SITLRun.sh.
_options.offline_logs.output_dir: Destination folder for copied PX4 .ulg logs.
_options.offline_logs.firmware_dir: Optional PX4 Firmware root. Defaults to C:/PX4PSP/Firmware on Windows or ~/PX4PSP/Firmware on Linux.

name: Hover, inject IMU fault

toolchain._comment: enabled=true launches the platform-specific toolchain script. Windows uses SITLRun.bat; Linux uses SITLRun.sh. startup_wait_s waits for RflySim/PX4 startup.

recording._comment: When enabled, one online xlsx workbook is written to output_dir with one sheet per vehicle. sample_hz controls online sampling frequency.

offline_logs._comment: DT-only verification copies the newest PX4 .ulg from each instance_N/log/date folder after the run. date is optional; when omitted the latest date folder is used.

vehicles._comment: Source/full-toolchain DT. startup_delay_s waits after MAVLink/true-data loops; offboard_delay_s waits after initOffboard.
Tested DT. Fault actions can target this id through timeline steps such as targets: ["dt2"].

timeline._comment: mission streams generated trajectory points. trajectory.type can be circle, rectangle, figure8, or sin.
Send SendHILCtrlMsg(mode, flag, params) to dt2 and mark phase 9 in the PX4 log.
